settings.text: DimenAI helps Shopify merchants show accurate real-time rates from UPS, USPS, FedEx & Australia Post — and automatically packs orders into the right box using AI 3D bin packing.

settings.hero_badge: Trusted Shopify Shipping App — UPS · USPS · FedEx · Australia Post

settings.icon_svg: <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M21 16V8a2 2 0 0 0-1-1.73l-7-4a2 2 0 0 0-2 0l-7 4A2 2 0 0 0 3 8v8a2 2 0 0 0 1 1.73l7 4a2 2 0 0 0 2 0l7-4A2 2 0 0 0 21 16z"></path><polyline points="3.27 6.96 12 12.01 20.73 6.96"></polyline><line x1="12" y1="22.08" x2="12" y2="12"></line></svg>
settings.title: AI 3D Bin Packing
settings.text: DimenAI's AI automatically fits every item from an order into your boxes using 3D spatial logic — so you always use the right size box, eliminate oversized packaging, and never overpay on dimensional weight.

settings.icon_svg: <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="1" y="3" width="15" height="13"></rect><polygon points="16 8 20 8 23 11 23 16 16 16 16 8"></polygon><circle cx="5.5" cy="18.5" r="2.5"></circle><circle cx="18.5" cy="18.5" r="2.5"></circle></svg>
settings.title: Live Rates at Checkout
settings.text: Display real-time shipping rates from UPS, USPS, FedEx, and Australia Post directly at checkout and in the Shopify admin — one app, all major carriers.

settings.icon_svg: <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="2" y="7" width="20" height="14" rx="2" ry="2"></rect><path d="M16 21V5a2 2 0 0 0-2-2h-4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16"></path></svg>
settings.title: Box & Package Management
settings.text: Create and store your custom box sizes with dimensions and weight limits. DimenAI uses your exact packaging data to calculate accurate rates and optimal packing on every order.

settings.icon_svg: <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"></path><polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"></polyline><line x1="16" y1="13" x2="8" y2="13"></line><line x1="16" y1="17" x2="8" y2="17"></line></svg>
settings.title: Order Shipment Workflow
settings.text: Review orders, see which boxes the AI packed them into, compare carrier rates, and buy shipping labels — all inside DimenAI without switching tabs.

settings.icon_svg: <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="12" y1="1" x2="12" y2="23"></line><path d="M17 5H9.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 0 0 7h5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 0 7H6"></path></svg>
settings.title: Flexible Handling Fees
settings.text: Configure separate handling fees per product and per carrier to protect your margins. Add a flat fee, percentage markup, or a combination — precise control over every shipping charge.

settings.title: Everything You Need to Ship Efficiently
Real-Time Rates from Every Major Carrier
settings.text: Your customers see live shipping options from UPS, USPS, FedEx, and Australia Post right at checkout — calculated using the actual packed box dimensions, not guesses. Accurate rates build trust and reduce abandoned carts.

settings.title: AI 3D Bin Packing That Saves You Money
settings.text: Stop guessing which box to use. DimenAI's AI analyzes each order and calculates the most space-efficient configuration in real time. Use the right box every time — reduce material waste and cut dimensional weight costs by up to 30%.

settings.title: Connect Your Carrier Accounts Securely
settings.text: Bring your own UPS, USPS, FedEx, and Australia Post accounts. DimenAI securely stores your credentials and uses them to fetch negotiated rates — so your customers always see the pricing your account qualifies for.

settings.title: Predefined Carrier Packaging — Ready in One Click
settings.text: Access a full library of official carrier boxes and satchels from UPS, USPS, FedEx, and Australia Post. Add them to your account in one click so DimenAI can use them for accurate rate calculations and bin packing right away.

settings.title: One App, Four Carriers
settings.text: UPS, USPS, FedEx, and Australia Post — managed from a single dashboard. No more juggling separate apps or rate calculators.

settings.title: Your Negotiated Rates
settings.text: Use your own carrier account credentials so customers see the exact rates your business has negotiated — not inflated defaults.

settings.title: Eliminate Oversized Packaging
settings.text: AI 3D bin packing finds the smallest box that fits your items — cutting material cost, dimensional weight fees, and shipping waste simultaneously.

settings.title: Buy Labels Without Leaving
settings.text: Review packed boxes, compare carrier rates, and purchase shipping labels — all inside DimenAI. A complete fulfilment workflow in one place.

settings.icon_svg: <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="12" y1="1" x2="12" y2="23"></line><path d="M17 5H9.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 0 0 7h5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 0 7H6"></path></svg>
settings.title: Control Your Margins
settings.text: Set product-level and carrier-level handling fees independently — add a flat amount or percentage markup to protect your shipping margins on every order.

settings.icon_svg: <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"></path></svg>
settings.title: Metric & Imperial Support
settings.text: Choose Metric (cm/kg) or Imperial (in/lbs) — DimenAI adapts all rate calculations and box dimensions to your preferred measurement system.

settings.title: Stop Overpaying for Shipping
settings.text: Install DimenAI on your Shopify store and start offering accurate carrier rates with AI-optimized packing today — free to get started.
